steps.title: Recognize opposite x coefficients
steps.content: In the first equation, $x$ has coefficient \$3$. In the second equation, $x$ has coefficient $-3$. These are opposites, so adding the two equations will eliminate $x$ entirely, leaving us with an equation in $y$ only.

steps.title: Add the equations to solve for 2y
steps.content:
Add both equations:
$$(3x + 6y) + (-3x - 4y) = 17 + 5$$

The $x$ terms cancel, and simplifying gives:
$$2y = 22$$

The value of $2y$ is 22.
